topic: Adoptable ideas from competitor AI design tools for sk-interface-design and mcp-magicpath

reason: config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir override supplied by operator; resolveArtifactRoot command intentionally not run
operator constrained this fan-out lineage to write only inside artifact_dir; parent spec.md pre-init and post-synthesis write-back were skipped

focus: v0 by Vercel: live visual editing, registries, and Figma import
noveltyJustification: First evidence pass; v0 adds live-preview visual controls, Tailwind-aware pending edits, Figma token extraction, and registry context beyond packet 005's Claude Design baseline.

ruledOut.approach: Clone v0 end-to-end deployment and backend agent
ruledOut.reason: Platform hosting and full-stack deployment exceed two CLI-skill scope

focus: Lovable: pre-build design guidance, preview-toolbar feedback, design-system adherence, and browser testing
noveltyJustification: Lovable confirms a distinct pre-build three-direction gate and an explicit design-system violation scanner; overlaps with 005 fidelity loops but adds a sharper governance taxonomy.

ruledOut.approach: Add a preset palette/font/layout chooser to sk-interface-design
ruledOut.reason: Lovable's curated questions are useful as a contrast pattern but would weaken the anti-default mandate if copied as presets

focus: Figma Make: plan mode, Make kits, guidelines, local-codebase editing, and design round-tripping
noveltyJustification: Figma Make overlaps on context and visual feedback but adds reviewable plan.md, guidelines-as-context, Make kits, local commit/PR semantics, and copy-preview-as-layers round trip.

ruledOut.approach: Replicate Figma Make local repository branch/PR management inside mcp-magicpath
ruledOut.reason: Git branching and PR creation belong to sk-git/system workflows, not the MagicPath CLI skill

focus: Subframe and adjacent design-to-code tools: deterministic presentational code, sync boundaries, MCP design access
noveltyJustification: Subframe adds a clean separable model: deterministic presentational UI, one-way synced design-system components, wrapper-owned business logic, and MCP-accessible design documents.

ruledOut.approach: Make generated MagicPath component source a two-way design-system source of truth
ruledOut.reason: Subframe itself treats component sync as one-way and warns local edits are overwritten; mcp-magicpath should keep generated files and app wrappers distinct

focus: Deduplication against packet 005 and prioritized adoption matrix for both local skills
noveltyJustification: Mostly synthesis and dedupe, but it produced new prioritized patterns: direction-gate, element-target grammar, adherence scanner, plan artifact, and presentational wrapper boundary.

ruledOut.approach: Hosted web-product capabilities: live multiplayer canvas, publishing/hosting, billing, enterprise admin, app backend setup
ruledOut.reason: Out of scope for lean CLI skills; preserve as negative knowledge rather than recommendations

ruledOut.approach: Subtle visual-diff automation as a completion gate
ruledOut.reason: Lovable documents browser testing as unreliable for subtle visual design details; use human/design judgment plus screenshots instead
